babyDevelopment: Your body is preparing for ovulation. A follicle in your ovary is ripening, containing the egg that will become your baby. The uterine lining (endometrium) is thickening to provide a nutrient-rich home for the eventual embryo.
bodyChanges: You may notice an increase in clear, stretchy cervical mucus (like egg whites). Basal body temperature might dip slightly before a post-ovulation spike. Libido often increases naturally.
tips: Have intercourse every 1-2 days during your fertile window
Avoid vaginal lubricants that aren't sperm-friendly
Stop smoking and alcohol consumption immediately

dont: Take hot baths/saunas (if partner is present, as heat affects sperm)

travelAdvisory.note: Safe to travel; focus on stress reduction.

milestoneDescription: Ovulation usually occurs late this week. The magic is about to happen.
